_provenance.note: Real England addresses from HM Land Registry Price Paid Data, enriched with SIMULATED investment-scenario metadata for the demo persona. Never present the simulated fields as real commitments.

eaCurrentFloods.detail: The source answered but holds no records for this query.

bgsRadon.licence: Contains British Geological Survey materials © UKRI (open GeoIndex viewing service)

records.description: Some parts of this 1km grid square are in bands of elevated radon potential. Maximum radon potential is 10-30 %. Check the radon potential of individual addresses at UKRadon.org

bgsGroundStability.licence: Contains British Geological Survey materials © UKRI (open GeoIndex viewing service)
bgsGroundStability.detail: BGS GeoSure (shrink–swell, landslides, ground stability) is a licensed dataset with no open query API. Reported as a data gap; consider ordering GeoSure or using local-authority SFRA documents.

epc.licence: OGL v3.0 (contains EPC data © Crown copyright)
epc.detail: EPC open data needs a free bearer token from get-energy-performance-data.communities.gov.uk (see .env.example / README). Energy findings are unavailable until it is configured.

companiesHouse.detail: Companies House needs a free API key (see .env.example / README). Ownership findings are unavailable until it is configured.

landRegistryCcodOcod.licence: HM Land Registry Free Datasets Licence (CCOD/OCOD)
landRegistryCcodOcod.detail: Land Registry CCOD/OCOD needs a free 'Use land and property data' API key (see .env.example / README). Corporate-ownership findings are unavailable until it is configured.
